sourceMovie.title: Sucker Punch
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Sucker Punch (2011) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Underworld: Evolution
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sucker Punch clicked for you, Underworld: Evolution (2006) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and fantasy, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sucker Punch?
faq.answer: Try Underworld: Evolution, Underworld: Rise of the Lycans, Blood Diamond—each shares DNA with Sucker Punch while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sucker Punch?
faq.answer: Sucker Punch (2011) is best described as Action, Fantasy, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sucker Punch worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
